reasons: Angela can attach to Ling during a backline dive, adding protection and movement support without needing to follow his wall movement.
Ling benefits from attached support because he often fights far away from the rest of the team.

proof.summary: Ling enters fights from extreme angles, and Angela can support his dive through attachment-based protection.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Ling fully commits to the backline.
Ling has an escape route or ultimate timing after the dive.
failureCases: Ling dives into heavy control before Angela can protect him.
Angela attaches after Ling has already spent his mobility.
The enemy saves suppression or instant burst for Ling's entry.

reasons: Floryn can heal Ling globally, which fits Ling's habit of fighting far from the main team.
The global support helps Ling continue pressure after a risky dive or objective skirmish.

proof.summary: Ling often commits away from his support, and Floryn can still assist him with global healing.
worksBestWhen: Ling survives long enough for the heal to matter.
failureCases: Ling is locked down and killed before the heal changes the fight.
Floryn heals too early before Ling commits.
Ling dives without energy or escape resources.

reasons: Chip can help the team arrive near Ling's side pressure or pickoff angle instead of leaving Ling isolated.
Ling's fast map pressure becomes more valuable when teammates can rotate into the created opening.

proof.summary: Ling creates map pressure quickly, and Chip can help teammates rotate around that pressure.
worksBestWhen: Chip uses portals after Ling creates side pressure.
The team has vision before entering the portal.
failureCases: The team enters the portal late.
The portal sends teammates into a bad fight without vision.
Ling creates pressure while Chip's key rotation skill is unavailable.

reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag a priority target, giving Ling a simple assassination target.
Ling can use his mobility to follow Kaja's catch and finish the isolated target.

proof.summary: Kaja removes the target's movement window, while Ling follows with fast burst and chase.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches a damage dealer before Ling commits.
Ling is close enough to follow the drag.
failureCases: Ling is too far to follow the catch.
The enemy peels Ling after Kaja's suppression ends.

reasons: Tigreal can start grouped fights that give Ling a safer timing to enter after enemies are controlled.
Ling can wait for the first engage and then dive the backline during the enemy's disrupted formation.

proof.summary: Tigreal absorbs the first engage window, and Ling follows after enemies are controlled or displaced.
worksBestWhen: Ling waits for Tigreal's engage instead of entering first.
Tigreal catches targets that allow Ling to reach the backline safely.
failureCases: Tigreal engages outside Ling's follow-up route.
The enemy saves anti-dive control for Ling after Tigreal's engage.
